changelog: v3.2.1: Polling rate guidance unified across Devices, Fortnite KBM and Controller pages - 1000 Hz safe default, 2000 Hz acceptable on top-tier CPUs, stay below 4000 Hz on Unreal Engine games. Intel APO eligibility detection (CPU > Optimize) for K-SKU 14th gen and Core Ultra. Navbar fix: pinned section accordion now mutually excludes Streaming/Fortnite, and the dark scrollbar track is clickable. Fortnite replay benchmarking flagged as currently broken. Fortnite KBM starting-points description box restructured into sectioned subheaders for readability.
